summary: Episode 11: On a clear night, the recovering traveler took Tariq up to the rooftop and taught him how travelers navigate by the stars, naming the bright ones as he pointed. Salim joined them and explained the star names were carefully recorded by astronomers who mapped the sky. Tariq's curiosity deepened further, and the traveler began to share news and tales from the distant lands he had crossed. Noor still doesn't know who leaves the gifts at her door.
open_threads: Noor still doesn't know who leaves the anonymous gifts at her door
Tariq's curiosity and love of learning are growing under Salim's teaching
The traveler has begun sharing news and tales from distant lands; more to come
Noor's courtyard reading circle keeps growing and needs more copied pages
